conditions.analyte_polymer: PEG, MPEG, MPEG-MM 1, MPEG-MM 2, poly(MPEG-MM 2), copolymers of MPEG-MM and methacrylic acid
conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical point of adsorption for PEG
conditions.evidence_text: Typical LC-CC conditions for PEO are a non-polar stationary phase of RP-18 (octadecyl modified silica gel) and a mobile phase composition of methanol-water 81:19 wt.-%. At critical conditions, PEGs of different molar masses elute at the same elution volume.
conditions.notes: Used for separation of MPEG and macromonomer with regard to endgroups irrespective of molar mass. Also used for copolymers to compensate for PEO molar mass distribution.
conditions.physical_address: Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), SchloBgartenstr. 6, 64289 Darmstadt, Germany
